productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Women F Night Logo TT White Jacket
description: Composition White track top with the shell made of 100% polyester, has long sleeves with elasticated cuffs, adidas patented 3-Stripes on the shoulder, a ribbed collar, embroidered branding on the left chest, zippered front placket with branded zipper, two pockets on the front with button closues, branding with stone emebellishments at the back and an elasticated hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash No bleaching, dry cleaning Iron with medium heat Do not iron on print Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This sweatshirt beats the winter chill with panache. Wear this to any off-duty event to look your best. Pair this with a richly hued tee, classic denims and sports shoes to snazz up your style. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8”and chest 33”
